title: prestonia hirsuta
side_effects: Prestonia hirsuta can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing excessive sweating, nausea, and vomiting in some individuals. In rare cases, it can also cause headaches, dizziness, and an irregular heartbeat. Additionally, if ingested in large quantities, Prestonia hirsuta may lead to stomach problems, including diarrhea and stomach cramps. It is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using this plant to avoid any potential side effects.
